title: jadeownerfix
description:
Fixed an issue where the Jade mod displayed a pet owner as "???" in offline mode.

You only need to install the Jade mod on both the server and the client. Tested with

 

NeoForge 1.21.1-219

Jade 1.21.1 NeoForge 15.10.5.
body:
Fixed an issue where the Jade mod displayed a pet owner as "???" in offline mode.

You only need to install the Jade mod on both the server and the client. Tested with

 

NeoForge 1.21.1-219

Jade 1.21.1 NeoForge 15.10.5.
